customProductGroup: Battery Energy Storage System EPC Services
underlyingMechanism: Turnkey systems integration: containerized Li-ion BESS + bidirectional PCS + MV grid coupling + EMS dispatch + civil works, delivered under single EPC contract with VDE-AR-N 4110 / FGW TR8 certification. Mechanism is the execution methodology, not a physical artifact (Project Business offering type).

productFP.statement: Deliver grid-compliant, dispatchable multi-MWh electrical energy storage as a turnkey capital asset with single-source responsibility from site study to commissioning
productFP.object: grid-compliant, dispatchable multi-MWh electrical energy storage
productFP.context: as a turnkey capital asset with single-source responsibility from site study to commissioning
differentiators: Single-point EPC accountability vs. split-contract approach
Integrated PV+BESS design authority from incumbent PV-EPC practice
Native VDE-AR-N 4110 / FGW TR8 certification path
Proven industrial scale (4.5 MW / 9 MWh reference)

commodityFP.commodityOrGroup: Battery Energy Storage System EPC Services
commodityFP.statement: Deliver operational grid-connected electrical energy storage assets as turnkey capital projects with single-source engineering, procurement, construction, and grid-code certification
commodityFP.object: operational grid-connected electrical energy storage assets
commodityFP.context: as turnkey capital projects with single-source engineering, procurement, construction, and grid-code certification
commodityFP.reasoning: All BESS EPC providers share the function of converting a storage business case into a commissioned, grid-compliant asset. Mechanism varies (self-perform vs. subcontract, PV-integrated vs. standalone); function does not.

fpExtension.statement: The underlying EPC execution capability — single-source integration, VDE-AR-N 4110 / FGW TR8 certification delivery, and MV grid coupling — applies beyond BESS to any grid-connected electrical capital asset where an owner wants one counterparty to convert a business case into a commissioned, certified, operational asset.

axes.description: Same grid-facing EPC scope applied to non-lithium storage media
extension_domains: Thermal-to-power storage EPC (hot-rock, molten-salt with ORC)

axes.description: Same single-source-EPC + VDE-AR-N 4110 + FGW TR8 delivery capability applied to non-storage grid-connected assets
extension_domains: High-power EV charging park EPC (HPC hubs)
Behind-the-meter industrial electrification EPC (heat-pump + BESS + PV)

upstreamL2Suppliers: BESS container integrators (Sungrow, Tesla, CATL EnerC, SolarEast)
PCS makers (SMA, Sungrow, Power Electronics, Ingeteam)
Cell makers at L3 (CATL, EVE, BYD)

complements.name: MV grid connection capacity (DSO)
complements.note: Hard blocker; grid upgrade cost can invalidate the project

complements.name: Revenue-stream access (peak shaving, EPEX arbitrage, FCR/aFRR, §19 StromNEV)
complements.note: Without a revenue stream the business case fails

complements.name: EMS / VPP / aggregator integration
complements.note: Next Kraftwerke, Entrix, Flexpower, Enspired, Tiko

complements.name: Intraday / balancing trading desk
complements.note: Via aggregator if owner has none
